results.title: ‘Don’t rush to marry, marriage not achievement’ – B-Lord
results.description: Celebrity Nigerian businessman Linus Williams Ifejirika, also known as Blord, has urged singles to wait until they financially and emotionally prepared before considering marriage. Speaking in a recent episode of the Adult Gist podcast, B-Lord frowned at the practice of some youths rushing into marriage before they are financially stable due to peer pressure and [...] ‘Don’t rush to marry, marriage not achievement’ – B-Lord
